hero.heading: I'm Luka, a photographer from Slovenia. Through my camera I create *memories* that outlast the moment itself.

about.label: The Work
about.heading: About
about.name: Luka Božič
about.p1: I am Luka Božič, and my passion is photography, through which I strive to capture authentic moments and weave them into a story. In my portfolio, you will find a wide variety of projects – from landscapes, concerts, and events to automotive photography. In short, I pour my heart into photography.
about.p2: With every press of the shutter, I try to capture emotion and depth—whether I am shooting events, concerts, portraits, or everyday scenes that carry a silent narrative. Before I take a shot, I observe; I look for those subtle details, expressions, and fleeting moments that often go unnoticed.
about.p3: For me, photography is more than just a hobby; it is my passion and the way I see the world. My goal is simple: to create photos from my unique perspective that preserve a captured moment forever.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: For projects, session bookings or just to say hello – I'd love to hear from you through any of the channels below.
